text:
Earlier Russian athletes were allowed to compete under the banner of the Russian Olympic Committee (ROC) after a series of doping scandals. They participated in the Tokyo Olympics 2020 under the ROC flag and the flag of the Russian Federation. What will they do at the Paris Olympics 2024?
